title: How quants really make money.
summary: QFEX is a 24/7 perpetual futures exchange founded in 2025 by Annanay Kapila and Joshua Wharton. It offers up to 50x leverage on US stocks, forex, and commodities without intermediary brokers. The platform raised $9.5M in a March 2026 seed round led by General Catalyst.
